mapper.sql: id, asset_id, repair_code, repair_date, finish_date, repair_type, repair_reason, repair_content, repair_bus, repair_person, repair_fee, repair_status, remark, cdate, udate
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from repair
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into repair (id, asset_id, repair_code, repair_date, finish_date, repair_type, repair_reason, repair_content, repair_bus, repair_person, repair_fee, repair_status, remark, cdate, udate ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into repair
id,
asset_id,
repair_code,
repair_date,
finish_date,
repair_type,
repair_reason,
repair_content,
repair_bus,
repair_person,
repair_fee,
repair_status,
remark,
cdate,
udate,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update repair
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_code = #{record.repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_date = #{record.repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
repair_type = #{record.repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_reason = #{record.repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_content = #{record.repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_bus = #{record.repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_person = #{record.repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_fee = #{record.repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_status = #{record.repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update repair set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_code = #{record.repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_date = #{record.repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repair_type = #{record.repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_reason = #{record.repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_content = #{record.repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_bus = #{record.repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_person = #{record.repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_fee = #{record.repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_status = #{record.repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update repair
asset_id = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_code = #{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_date = #{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
repair_type = #{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
repair_reason = #{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_content = #{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_bus = #{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_person = #{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_fee = #{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
repair_status = #{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update repair set asset_id = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_code = #{repairCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_date = #{repairDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish_date = #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repair_type = #{repairType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_reason = #{repairReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_content = #{repairContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_bus = #{repairBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_person = #{repairPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_fee = #{repairFee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_status = #{repairStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
